commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The righteous chooses his friends carefully: but the way of the wicked leads them astray. A true friend will make any sacrifice. (Calmet) "I am convinced that friendship can subsist only among the good "says Cicero. Hebrew, "the just hath more, (Calmet; Protestants) or is more excellent than his neighbour. "Septuagint, "the intelligent just is his own friend; (but the sentences of the impious are contrary to equity. Evils shall pursue sinners) but the way "(Grabe) (Haydock).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
